tasks.label: $(package) Build plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Create slytranslate.zip in the workspace root

tasks.label: $(verified) Verify plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Run the archive checks against slytranslate.zip

tasks.label: $(combine) Build and verify plugin ZIP

tasks.description: Build slytranslate.zip and verify the archive contents

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy plugin ZIP to WordPress pod

tasks.description: Upload slytranslate.zip into the wordpress container in namespace websites

tasks.label: $(rocket) Build and deploy plugin ZIP
tasks.task: SlyTranslate: Build and Deploy Plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Build, verify, and deploy slytranslate.zip to the websites WordPress pod
